detail.description: Bryan Torres triples (2) on a fly ball to right fielder Eli White.
Bryan Torres homers (2) on a fly ball to right field. Jordan Walker scores.
Bryan Torres singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Eugenio Suárez. José Fermín to 2nd.
Bryan Torres singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Eugenio Suárez. Alec Burleson to 3rd. José Fermín to 2nd.
Bryan Torres singles on a ground ball to left fielder Alejandro Osuna.
Bryan Torres triples (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Sal Frelick. Jordan Walker scores.
Bryan Torres singles on a line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Bryan Torres singles on a line drive to right fielder Sal Frelick.
Bryan Torres homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field. Masyn Winn scores.
Bryan Torres singles on a line drive to right fielder Blake Dunn. Masyn Winn to 2nd.
Bryan Torres singles on a line drive to left fielder TJ Friedl. Nolan Gorman to 2nd.
Bryan Torres singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Blaze Jordan to 3rd.
Bryan Torres homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.
